title: Robert Irwin Discusses AI Impact on Wildlife Photography
description: Robert Irwin is trending in New Zealand following reports about his views on artificial intelligence in photography and its effect on animals.

sources.title: ‘AI Takes Away From the Artistry of Photography’ Says Robert Irwin
Robert Irwin Gets Emotional Over How AI Has Impacted The World's Most Incredible Animals
“AI dilutes what is impressive” – Robert Irwin hits the nail on the head when it comes to artificial intelligence in wildlife photography

sections.heading: Search Trends in New Zealand
paragraphs: The search term "robert irwin" is currently trending in the NZ region. According to the data, the search lower bound is 1000, and the trend feed was published on July 22, 2026.

sections.heading: Views on Photography Artistry
paragraphs: According to PetaPixel, Robert Irwin stated that "AI Takes Away From the Artistry of Photography." Additionally, Digital Camera World reports that Irwin believes "AI dilutes what is impressive" regarding artificial intelligence in wildlife photography.

sections.heading: Emotional Impact on Wildlife
paragraphs: LittleThings.com reports that Robert Irwin got emotional over how AI has impacted the world's most incredible animals.

faq.q: What did Robert Irwin say about AI?
faq.a: According to PetaPixel, he said AI takes away from the artistry of photography. Digital Camera World also reports he stated that AI dilutes what is impressive.
He is trending in the NZ region with a search volume lower bound of 1000, coinciding with news coverage about his comments on artificial intelligence and animals.
